mapper.insert: INSERT INTO student (student_no, name, gender, birthday, political, id_card, college_code, major_code, grade, address, phone, zip_code) VALUES (#{studentNo}, #{name}, #{gender}, #{birthday}, #{political}, #{idCard}, #{collegeCode}, #{majorCode}, #{grade}, #{address}, #{phone}, #{zipCode})
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM student ORDER BY id DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE student SET student_no = #{studentNo}, name = #{name}, gender = #{gender}, birthday = #{birthday}, political = #{political}, id_card = #{idCard}, college_code = #{collegeCode}, major_code = #{majorCode}, grade = #{grade}, address = #{address}, phone = #{phone}, zip_code = #{zipCode} WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT c.college_name AS collegeName, COUNT(s.id) AS studentCount FROM student s LEFT JOIN college c ON s.college_code = c.college_code GROUP BY s.college_code, c.college_name
SELECT major_code AS majorCode, COUNT(id) AS studentCount FROM student GROUP BY major_code
